title: agentry project overlay config
description: Per-project flavor config read by core agents/skills/hooks at runtime. Replaces the old token-rewrite (adapt) class: framework files reference these values instead of baking in project names.

name.description: kebab-case slug; also the workspace + AGENT_PROJECT key

codePath.description: absolute path to the project's code repo(s) root

monorepo.description: monorepo root dir name, if any

device.description: edge/IoT device repo name, if any

domainTerms.description: domain nouns used in prompts (product, device, threatModelExample, …)

enabledPacks.description: domain packs this project enables (mirrors .claude/settings.json enabledPlugins)
